old_title: Áo chạy bộ Nipro màu hồng-xanh dương nổi bật FDL Sống Khỏe
draft_new_title: Bộ Quần Áo Pickleball Nipro Hồng Xanh X24-PB-001

text_decisions.source: áo chạy bộ / running / race terms

notes: Public WordPress REST read succeeded for product 1776 and media 2400.
WooCommerce REST namespace exists but unauthenticated product listing returned 401; write/update test needs WooCommerce credentials.
No WordPress upload/update performed in this demo.

qa.wc_rest_public: 401 unauthenticated; credentials required for write/batch update
qa.generated_image: 1024x1024 webp; pickleball court and paddle present
qa.known_issue: Generated image preserves palette and FDL mark but simplifies lower-shirt graphics and moves Nipro/Song Khoe marks onto accessories instead of preserving all source placement on garment.
qa.v2_feedback_applied: male/female together; apparel-focused standing pose; female three-quarter-back around 60%; male front-facing upright and stronger; no technical hitting stance.
qa.v2_known_issue: Back design is inferred from front because no source back image was available; detailed back text/logos were intentionally not invented.
qa.v3_logo_rebrand_applied: Old garment logos/text removed from shirts; mayaopickleball.vn logo/wordmark printed on both male front shirt and female back shirt; no separate corner watermark/contact footer added.
qa.v3_known_issue: Logo text is readable enough for demo but should be checked at product-card thumbnail size before production; source back design is inferred because only front source image was available.
qa.v4_small_logo_feedback_applied: Logo is chest-crest scale on male front and small upper-back mark on female; old garment logos removed; dark mark contrasts against pink shirt areas; no poster/sticker/white-box look.
qa.v4_known_issue: Wordmark is small, appropriate for shirt logo scale but should be checked at product-card thumbnail size; if stronger readability is needed, use wordmark-only and increase mark size about 15-20%.
qa.v5_final_policy_applied: Removed running-related garment marks; small X24 chest logo only; clean back with no logo; blank paddle faces; mayaopickleball.vn used only as corner watermark.
qa.v5_known_issue: X24 chest mark is small and appropriate; production should still spot-check thumbnail readability per product.
qa.v6_color_dots_applied: Added vertical color-availability dots for Trắng, Đen, Hồng, Đỏ, Vàng, Xanh Blue, Green, and + as post-processing overlay; X24 chest logo, clean back, blank paddles, and mayaopickleball corner watermark retained.

woocommerce_api.note: WooCommerce API key/secret can read product metadata. No live update was performed because local image upload requires WordPress media auth or a public image URL.

verification.remaining_global_site_text: Header/footer/menu still contain legacy running-site branding and links outside this product record.
